name: Lyla
description: A descending 10-to-1 couplet of muscle-ups and bodyweight-relative clean and jerks, structurally similar to Linda but built around gymnastics and Olympic lifting rather than powerlifting-style strength.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
